case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DARLENE SPEARS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPEARS, DARLENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1025 WISCONSIN ST. S.F. CA. 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SPEARS, DARLENE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JUN-18-2007, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SPEARS, DARLENE
